response.justification: The candidate is a strong technical match on paper — deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience, relational database knowledge, Kubernetes and AWS exposure, and recent LLM/MCP agent-infrastructure work that hits several nice-to-haves. However, this is an entry-level junior/mid role and the candidate has roughly 15+ years of experience at senior and staff level, creating a significant overqualification risk around compensation expectations, engagement, and retention. Additionally, the listed location (Lagos, Nigeria) conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement, though the German phone number and Berlin-based employment history suggest this may need clarification rather than disqualification.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience directly matching the core stack
Nice-to-have coverage: LLM/MCP tooling, Kubernetes, AWS, and OCR-adjacent platform work
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture advocacy, teaching/workshops)
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level position — retention and salary-fit risk
Current location listed as Lagos conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed (MongoDB/MySQL/SQL instead), and Nest.js experience is not stated
